meaning: adj.以历史画装饰的,历史上有名的,分层的
examples: Long work has a storied history.
We live a few blocks from the storied river.
GM is a great company with a storied history.
Yet in spite of her storied career, Ferreira had never performed in New York City.
Thain has a tightrope to walk between the future of the exchange and its storied past.
